nodes.title: Upscale Prompt String (Multiline)
widgets_values: Upscale image: Extremely detailed, 8k resolution, raw photo, masterfully enhanced all micro and macro details of elements in photo, high-fidelity, intricate textures, sharp focus, cinematic lighting, dramatic, professional color grading, photorealistic, fix all poorly detailed elements, improve clarity in all small and/or distant objects for better visibility, no over sharpening, no artifacts or other issues

nodes.title: Main Prompt Textbox
widgets_values: A breathtaking 8k wide-angle photograph of the Los Angeles coastal skyline at the transition from golden hour to night, seen from a beach with only a thin strip of distant  but detailed land and city silhouettes at the bottom of the frame and an ocean view. The sky is the main subject, vast and open, filled with elegant painterly cirrus clouds that curl and stretch across the atmosphere. The color palette is soft and cinematic: rich indigo and dusky blue overhead, blending into lavender-blue, then warm peach, apricot, and golden orange near the horizon. The clouds catch the remaining sunset light in luminous blush pink and warm rose-gold, with smooth gradients and a dreamy atmospheric glow. The feeling is calm, majestic, and slightly ethereal, like a premium editorial landscape photograph. Natural depth, realistic cloud texture, subtle haze, long-exposure night-photography mood, 35mm photography, f/8, HDR, ultra-detailed, 8k, cinematic realism.

Enhance the image by preserving the breathtaking 8k clarity and wide-angle composition, ensuring the Los Angeles coastal skyline remains a crisp, detailed silhouette along the lower edge with natural separation from the ocean. Sharpen the painterly cirrus clouds to reveal fine, realistic texture and subtle gradients, maintaining their elegant, luminous quality without over-sharpening or introducing artificial gloss. Emphasize the smooth, cinematic color transitions in the sky, from deep indigo and dusky blue overhead to warm peach and golden orange at the horizon, with clouds catching blush pink and rose-gold highlights. Improve micro-details in cloud edges and atmospheric haze for a dreamy, editorial landscape feel. Reduce noise and artifacts, especially in darker sky regions, while retaining natural depth and gentle long-exposure softness. Maintain authentic lens behavior, realistic exposure, and true-to-life color fidelity, ensuring the overall mood remains calm, majestic, and slightly ethereal, true to premium real-life photography.

The feeling is calm, majestic, and slightly ethereal, like a premium editorial landscape photograph. The sky is the main subject, vast and open, filled with elegant painterly cirrus clouds that curl and stretch across the atmosphere. The color palette is soft and cinematic: rich indigo and dusky blue overhead, blending into lavender-blue, then warm peach, apricot, and golden orange near the horizon. The clouds catch the remaining sunset light in luminous blush pink and warm rose-gold, with smooth gradients and a dreamy atmospheric glow. Natural depth, realistic cloud texture, subtle haze, long-exposure night-photography mood, 35mm photography, f/8, HDR, ultra-detailed, 8k, cinematic realism.

A breathtaking 8k wide-angle photograph captures the Los Angeles coastal skyline at the precise moment golden hour fades into night, viewed from a tranquil beach where a slender strip of distant land and city silhouettes anchors the bottom edge of the frame. The vast sky dominates the composition, stretching overhead in a sweeping expanse filled with elegant, painterly cirrus clouds that curl and drift gracefully across the atmosphere. The color palette transitions smoothly from deep indigo and dusky blue at the zenith, blending into soft lavender-blue, then melting into warm peach, apricot, and golden orange near the horizon. These luminous clouds catch the last traces of sunset, glowing with blush pink and rose-gold highlights that shimmer against the subtle gradients of the evening sky. The ocean in the foreground reflects the shifting colors with gentle ripples, adding a sense of serene movement and natural depth. The lighting is soft and cinematic, with the sun’s residual warmth casting a gentle glow on the clouds and a faint, cool ambient light settling over the water and distant cityscape. The city itself appears as a delicate silhouette, its details crisp yet understated, with occasional twinkles of early evening lights just beginning to emerge. The photograph is composed with a balanced, editorial sensibility: the horizon sits low, emphasizing the grandeur of the sky, while the wide-angle perspective and 35mm lens feel create a sense of immersive scale and spatial clarity. The image is rendered with ultra-detailed, high-dynamic-range realism, preserving authentic textures in the clouds, water, and distant architecture, and maintaining a dreamy, slightly ethereal mood that evokes calm majesty and natural beauty.
